sentences.arabic: أَصِيبَ الْوَلَدُ سَعِيدٌ بِسُعَالٍ شَدِيدٍ فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Dječaka Saida je noću uhvatio jak kašalj.
sentences.translationEn: The boy Saeed had a severe cough at night.

sentences.translation: Majka je ustala i dala mu lijek za kašalj.
sentences.translationEn: His mother got up and gave him cough medicine.

sentences.arabic: أَجْلَسَتْهُ وَأَعْطَتْهُ كُوبًا مِنَ الْمَاءِ الدَّافِئِ.
sentences.translation: Posadila ga je i dala mu čašu tople vode.
sentences.translationEn: She sat him up and gave him a glass of warm water.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ قَلِيلٍ هَدَأَ السُّعَالُ وَنَامَ سَعِيدٌ.
sentences.translation: Ubrzo je kašalj stao i Said je zaspao.
sentences.translationEn: After a while the cough calmed down and Saeed slept.
